channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Ipsos for Nova TV, 1–19 May 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Hrvatska socijalno-liberalna stranka (RE): 0 seats
  • Drito (ECR): 0 seats
  • Domovinski pokret (ECR): 0 seats
  • Stranka antikorupcije, razvoja i transparentnosti (*): 0 seats
  • Hrvatska seljačka stranka (*): 0 seats
  • Socijaldemokratska partija Hrvatske (S&D): 3–4 seats
  • Centar (RE): 0 seats
  • Most nezavisnih lista (ECR): 1 seats
  • Nezavisna Platforma Sjever (*): 0 seats
  • Hrvatska narodna stranka–liberalni demokrati (RE): 0 seats
  • Hrvatska demokratska zajednica (EPP): 5–6 seats
  • Hrvatski suverenisti (ECR): 0 seats
  • Hrvatska stranka umirovljenika (*): 0 seats
  • Pravo i Pravda (NI): 0 seats
  • Možemo! (Greens/EFA): 2 seats
  • Istarski demokratski sabor (RE): 0 seats
  • Dom i Nacionalno Okupljanje (ECR): 0 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by Ipsos for Nova TV, 1–19 May 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Ipsos for Nova TV, 1–19 May 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Hrvatska socijalno-liberalna stranka (RE): 0.1–0.8%
  • Drito (ECR): 1.7–3.8%
  • Domovinski pokret (ECR): 2.4–4.9%
  • Stranka antikorupcije, razvoja i transparentnosti (*): 1.0–2.7%
  • Hrvatska seljačka stranka (*): 0.2–1.3%
  • Socijaldemokratska partija Hrvatske (S&D): 20.4–26.0%
  • Centar (RE): 0.5–1.8%
  • Most nezavisnih lista (ECR): 7.3–11.1%
  • Nezavisna Platforma Sjever (*): 0.1–1.0%
  • Hrvatska narodna stranka–liberalni demokrati (RE): 0.2–1.2%
  • Hrvatska demokratska zajednica (EPP): 28.0–34.2%
  • Hrvatski suverenisti (ECR): 1.1–3.0%
  • Hrvatska stranka umirovljenika (*): 1.7–3.8%
  • Pravo i Pravda (NI): 0.6–2.1%
  • Možemo! (Greens/EFA): 11.9–16.5%
  • Istarski demokratski sabor (RE): 0.9–2.5%
  • Dom i Nacionalno Okupljanje (ECR): 1.2–3.1%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Promocija plus for RTL, 4–7 May 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Promocija plus for RTL, 4–7 May 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Hrvatska socijalno-liberalna stranka (RE): 0.3–1.4%
  • Drito (ECR): 2.0–4.3%
  • Domovinski pokret (ECR): 1.5–3.6%
  • Hrvatska seljačka stranka (*): 0.2–1.2%
  • Socijaldemokratska partija Hrvatske (S&D): 23.3–29.2%
  • Centar (RE): 0.7–2.3%
  • Most nezavisnih lista (ECR): 6.9–10.7%
  • Nezavisna Platforma Sjever (*): 0.6–2.0%
  • Fokus na bitno (RE): 0.1–1.0%
  • Hrvatska narodna stranka–liberalni demokrati (RE): 0.5–1.9%
  • Hrvatska demokratska zajednica (EPP): 31.0–37.4%
  • Hrvatski suverenisti (ECR): 0.5–1.9%
  • Hrvatska stranka umirovljenika (*): 0.4–1.7%
  • Pravo i Pravda (NI): 0.6–2.0%
  • Možemo! (Greens/EFA): 11.9–16.6%
  • Istarski demokratski sabor (RE): 0.6–2.2%
  • Dom i Nacionalno Okupljanje (ECR): 0.6–2.2%

item.description:

item.description:

  • Pravo i Pravda (NI): 0.6–2.0%

  • Dom i Nacionalno Okupljanje (ECR): 0.7–2.3%
